message:
feat(conformance): add 21 HyperLogLog accuracy and edge-case tests

Large-cardinality tests (100 elements via batched PFADD), duplicate
element handling, empty string element, PFMERGE WRONGTYPE guard, and
multi-key PFCOUNT on nonexistent keys.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
